Research Areas

View all projects →

Space Safety

Risk-aware autonomy, conjunction assessment, maneuver intent.

Navigation & Estimation

GNSS integrity, sensor fusion, robust state estimation.

Autonomy

Planning and control under uncertainty for real-world systems.
